title: Matterbridge go-e plugin
description: matterbridge-go-e — go-e Gemini/PRO EV charger via Modbus TCP

discovery.title: mDNS Discovery
discovery.description: Automatically discover go-e chargers on the network via _go-e._go-eCharger._tcp. Manual charger entries override discovery.

chargers.title: Chargers
chargers.description: List of go-e chargers to expose as Matter EVSE devices.

host.title: Host
host.description: IP address or hostname of the go-e charger

serial.title: Serial Number
serial.description: Charger serial number (optional, read from Modbus if omitted)

pollInterval.title: Poll Interval (ms)
pollInterval.description: How often to poll Modbus registers for status updates

debug.title: Enable Debug
debug.description: Enable debug logging for the plugin

unregisterOnShutdown.title: Unregister On Shutdown
unregisterOnShutdown.description: Unregister all devices on shutdown (development only)
